title: Ensembl 116 core through DuckDB MySQL
description: The host attaches Ensembl's public MySQL database read-only; the manifest materializes a release-pinned gene interval with ordinary SQL. The gene symbol is the binding {gene_symbol}. No Ensembl client or source-specific resolver is required.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT over a host-attached foreign catalog.

params.sql: SELECT g.stable_id AS ensembl_gene_id, x.display_label AS gene_symbol, sr.name AS seq_region, g.seq_region_start, g.seq_region_end, g.seq_region_strand, cs.version AS assembly, ed.db_name AS xref_source FROM ensembl.gene g JOIN ensembl.xref x ON x.xref_id = g.display_xref_id JOIN ensembl.external_db ed ON ed.external_db_id = x.external_db_id JOIN ensembl.seq_region sr ON sr.seq_region_id = g.seq_region_id JOIN ensembl.coord_system cs ON cs.coord_system_id = sr.coord_system_id WHERE x.display_label = getvariable('gene_symbol') AND cs.name = 'chromosome' ORDER BY g.is_current DESC, g.stable_id
